summary: Inbound requests increased 18% quarter over quarter.
Average response time improved from 2.8 days to 1.9 days.
Three process bottlenecks account for most delayed cases.
conclusions: The operating model is stable enough for scale.
The backlog is decreasing, but the intake spike should be monitored.
The next quarter should prioritize workflow standardization and reporting discipline.
appendix_notes: All figures are synthetic and shown only as a rendering demo.
This product is intentionally generic and contains no Chini assets or copy.
